title: Remove status labels assigned as DONE
excerpt:
Hi, a Status column usually has a label that marks the status as Done. Can I remove the “marked as Done?”

posts.author: Chang (Chang-Ching)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, a Status column usually has a label that marks the status as Done. Can I remove the “marked as Done?”

For example, I use Status columns to show Quarters or Countries, and there is nothing to do with the status completion.

Also, I have tried “Column Settings,” and some columns in default do not have a label assigned as Done, but some columns do.
